rows.title: Durable session/checkpoint/replay spine
rows.preconditions: Sprint 2 authoritative runtime-state model complete; CI stabilization gate passes.
rows.primary_outputs: Session metadata/checkpoint model, deterministic serialization/hash, filesystem store, review restore, replay evidence export, Testing-menu hook, focused validation summary.
rows.source_surfaces: Runtime state snapshot model, session/checkpoint/replay helpers, diagnostics/dev harness; core remains device-agnostic and support-pack isolated.
rows.doc_surfaces: Roadmap, NEXT_ACTIONS, WORKPLAN_CURRENT_RUN, release notes, known limitations, affected subsystem specs.
rows.test_gate: Session/checkpoint/replay focused tests plus inherited package quality gate, shell smoke, and simulated LabJack U6 smoke.
rows.major_risks: Scope creep; feature loss; unclear authority boundary; stale docs; overbroad validation churn.
rows.mitigations: Explicit non-goals; proof bundle; compatibility checks; changed-area validation; closeout registry/doc update.
rows.non_goals: No live mapping apply; no hardware writes; no historian production; no runtime logic deployment; no remote command authority.
rows.acceptance_summary: No-hardware checkpoint store/load, review-only restore, deterministic replay evidence (CLI and Testing menu), corrupt payload rejection, and requested/applied/observed boundaries preserved.
